title: नरसिंह मङ्गलाष्टकम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री नरसिंह मङ्गलाष्टकम् ॥

स्तम्भोद्भवाय सिंहाय हिरण्यकशिपोर्हराय।
प्रह्लादवरदाय च मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥१॥

उग्ररूपधराय चक्रिणे गदिने नमः।
ज्वालामालासमावृताय मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥२॥

दैत्यान्तकरवज्रनखाय भक्तवत्सलाय।
लक्ष्मीनरसिंहरूपाय मङ्गलं नरहर्यै नमः॥३॥

वेदान्तवेद्याय हरये विष्णवे परमात्मने।
सर्वरक्षाकराय च मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥४॥

भयनाशाय वीराय सर्वरोगनिवारिणे।
सर्वाभीष्टप्रदाय च मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥५॥

अहोबलनिवासाय योगानन्दाय शार्ङ्गिणे।
ज्योतिर्मयस्वरूपाय मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥६॥

ब्रह्मरुद्रादिवन्दिताय सकलश्रुतिसम्मताय।
आनन्दरूपदेवाय मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥७॥

सन्ध्यासमयसम्भूताय वैकुण्ठवासिने नमः।
सर्वलोकहिताय च मङ्गलं नरसिंहाय॥८॥

मङ्गलाष्टकमेतद्यो नरसिंहस्य भक्तितः।
पठेत् सर्वभयं नश्येद् विष्णुलोकं स गच्छति॥

॥ इति श्री नरसिंह मङ्गलाष्टकं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Narasimha Mangalashtakam ||

Stambhodbhavaya Simhaya Hiranyakashipor-haraya.
Prahladavaradaya Cha Mangalam Narasimhaya.||1||

Ugrarupadharaya Chakrine Gadine Namah.
Jvalamala-samavritaya Mangalam Narasimhaya.||2||

Daityantakara-vajranakhaya Bhaktavatsalaya.
Lakshmi-narasimha-rupaya Mangalam Naraharyai Namah.||3||

Vedanta-vedyaya Haraye Vishnave Paramatmane.
Sarva-rakshakaraya Cha Mangalam Narasimhaya.||4||

Bhayanashaya Veeraya Sarvaroga-nivarine.
Sarvabhishtapradaya Cha Mangalam Narasimhaya.||5||

Ahobala-nivasaya Yoganandaya Sharngine.
Jyotirmaya-swaroopaya Mangalam Narasimhaya.||6||

Brahma-rudra-adi-vanditaya Sakala-shruti-sammataya.
Anandarupa-devaya Mangalam Narasimhaya.||7||

Sandhya-samaya-sambhutaya Vaikuntha-vasine Namah.
Sarva-loka-hitaya Cha Mangalam Narasimhaya.||8||

Mangalashtakam-Etadyo Narasimhasya Bhaktitah.
Pathet Sarva-bhayam Nashyed Vishnulokam Sa Gachchhati.

|| Iti Shri Narasimha Mangalashtakam Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning:
१. स्तम्भ से प्रकट हुए, सिंहरूपी, हिरण्यकशिपुनाशक, प्रह्लादवरदायक नरसिंह को मंगल।

२. उग्ररूपधारी, चक्र-गदाधारी, ज्वालामाला से आवृत नरसिंह को मंगल।

३. दैत्यनाशक वज्रनखी, भक्तवत्सल, लक्ष्मीनरसिंह रूपधारी नरहरि को मंगल।

४. वेदान्तवेद्य, हरि, विष्णु, परमात्मा, सर्वरक्षाकर नरसिंह को मंगल।

५. भयनाशक, वीर, सर्वरोगनिवारक, सर्वाभीष्टप्रद नरसिंह को मंगल।

६. अहोबल निवासी, योगानन्द, शार्ङ्गधारी, ज्योतिर्मय नरसिंह को मंगल।

७. ब्रह्मा-रुद्र आदि से वन्दित, सकल श्रुतिसम्मत, आनन्दरूप नरसिंह को मंगल।

८. सन्ध्याकाल में प्रकट, वैकुण्ठवासी, सर्वलोकहितकारी नरसिंह को मंगल।

जो भक्तिपूर्वक इस नरसिंह मंगलाष्टक का पाठ करता है, उसका सर्वभय नष्ट होता है और वह विष्णुलोक को जाता है।
benefits: Destroys all fears — the most powerful fear-removing prayer
Invokes the fierce protective form of Lord Vishnu as Narasimha
Grants protection from enemies, evil forces, and black magic
Bestows fearlessness and attainment of Vishnu Loka
Powerful recitation during Narasimha Jayanti and twilight hours
Cures diseases and removes all obstacles from devotee's path
description: The Narasimha Mangalashtakam, known in Sanskrit as नरसिंह मङ्गलाष्टकम्, is an eight-verse devotional hymn in praise of Lord Narasimha. Attributed to Narasimha Purana, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to destroy all fears — the most powerful fear-removing prayer as well as bestow fearlessness and attainment of Vishnu Loka. Additionally, it is known to grant protection from enemies, evil forces, and black magic. This prayer is traditionally recited on Saturday (Shanivar) and during Narasimha Jayanti to invoke divine grace. At 8 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 5 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Narasimha Mangalashtakam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Narasimha Mangalashtakam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Eight auspicious verses invoking Lord Narasimha for fearlessness and divine protection.
